🏳️‍⚧️🏳️‍🌈 friendly <3

That sure doesn't look like your best friend anymore!

▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃

It's been five years, if not more, since you and Chris last saw each other.

What the hell happened to the softie who would spend his weekends FaceTiming you while watching Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog? He's a big, beefy, hunky, jock wrestler now? Interesting.

It's not just him that's unrecognisable; it's you too.

You're the "new guy" who managed to pin him. He's not mad about it. He couldn't care less because, for the life of him, he knows that he knows this face just inches from his, even if it is a little older now.

CW / TW

Possible body dysmorphia!! Mentions of size-shaming!! Potential for violence as this is wrestling!! And again with this series... MILD OLFACTOPHILIA!! ATHLETES ARE GONNA HAVE A SMELL!! AND THE NEXT MAN IN THIS SERIES WILL HAVE IT INTENTIONALLY!! SORRY 😘
